settings.heading: Your most luminous skin.
settings.subheading: Clinically validated formulas, beautifully made. Founded in Paris.

settings.heading: Your Daily Ritual
settings.subheading: Four steps. Five minutes. Transformative results.

settings.name: Cleanse
settings.desc: Apply gently to damp skin with circular motions. Rinse with cool water.

settings.name: Tone
settings.desc: Press toner into skin with clean palms — never rub.

settings.name: Serum
settings.desc: 3–4 drops warmed between fingers. Press into face and neck.

settings.name: Moisturise
settings.desc: Seal everything in. Work upward and outward from the centre.

settings.name: Hyaluronic Acid
settings.description: Draws and retains moisture at three depths of the skin.

settings.name: Bakuchiol
settings.description: Plant-derived retinol alternative. All the results, none of the sensitivity.

settings.name: Niacinamide
settings.description: Brightens, minimises pores, and strengthens the skin barrier.

settings.text: My skin has completely transformed in 6 weeks.
settings.name: Sophie L.

settings.text: The cleanser alone is worth every penny. My rosacea is calmer than it has been in years.
settings.name: Emma W.

settings.text: LUMIÈRE is the first skincare brand that has genuinely changed my skin.
settings.name: Camille R.

settings.text: Skincare rituals, new launches, and exclusive offers.
